name: Symantec Norton Data Services
notes:
This ASN represents the Symantec Norton Data Services network.   This network hosts a number of Norton online services including Norton Online Backup and Norton Clean Feed.   It's sole upstream is AS26282 which is the Symantec backbone.  If you are interested in peering with AS18924, please see the record for AS26282 which contains a number of public exchanges.
website: http://www.backup.com / nobu.norton.com / dns.norton.com
